svg.text: Explainable LLM Agent · Financial Document Intelligence

g.text: What are the minimum capital requirements
under Basel III for commercial banks?

svg.text: Under Basel III, banks must maintain a minimum CET1 ratio of 4.5%,
Tier 1 capital ratio of 6%, and total capital ratio of 8%. A Capital
Conservation Buffer of 2.5% raises the effective minimum CET1 to 7%.

g.text: Does GDPR’s right to erasure apply to

svg.text: GDPR Art. 17 right to erasure has exceptions for legal retention.
AMLD5 mandates 5-year retention; BaFin requires up to 10 years
for certain records. Erasure requests require legal review first.

g.text: What position limits apply under MiFID II

svg.text: MiFID II Art. 57 requires position limits on commodity derivatives.
Spot-month limits are set at 25% of deliverable supply; other-month
limits at 25% of open interest. Hedging exemptions apply.
